title: infer-configuration-values — output
description: Output of the infer-configuration-values Tool — the inferences map plus the token-consumption counter. Every inferred value carries a confidence score so the Ask phase can prioritise low-confidence fields for the consumer's attention (MUC-004 confirm-or-override path).

inferences.description: Map of Configuration-Vocabulary field name to {value, confidence}. Fields the LLM couldn't infer with non-zero confidence are absent — they route through the gather-ambiguous-fields Step.

value.description: The inferred string value (Configuration-Vocabulary fields are strings in v1; richer types are deferred).

confidence.description: Inference confidence on [0.0, 1.0]. The Ask phase sorts fields ascending by confidence so the consumer reviews the least-confident inferences first.

tokens_consumed.description: Total tokens consumed by the LLM call (prompt + completion). The Step's postcondition asserts this is <= token_budget; over-budget consumption raises MUC-008 and is logged for v1.1 budget calibration.
